titleStmt.title: SII 37.29: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 29. (A.R. No. 407 of 1938-39.) Peṇḍlimarri, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Vīrabhadra temple.

This is dated Nandana, Māgha śu. 1, Monday. It refers to Dēvarāya, the Vijayanagara ruler, who may be identified with Dēvarāya I, as the cyclic year Nandaṇa falls only during his reign (1406-22 A.D.). Hence the details of the date may be equated to 1413 A.D., January 3. However the week-day was Tuesday.

It records a gift of wet land (vari-maḍi) of 30 tūmus (muppandumu) in lieu of 300 Siṅgāyamāḍalu at the rate of 100 per puṭṭi (which is obviously equal to 10 tūmus) by Mallānāyaniṅgāru, son of Raṅgānāyaniṅgāru to Aubaḷaya and others of the village Peṇḍlimaṟi for maintaining the tank bund of the Peda-cheṟuvu situated to the west of the village. The inscription also specifies the apportionment of the land which is granted as daśavanda among the donees. Further, the gift land is exempted from the taxes such as nāna-brālu. The gift village is stated to have been received by the donor as nāyaṅkara.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh: Cuddapah District, part II, No. 34.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēsvara rājādhirāju rājaparamēśvara cetu
samudrādhipatiyaina śrī vīradēvarāya voḍayalu vijayanagara maṁdunukha
saṁkhadhvāvinūdaṁbuna bṛidhivirāṁjyaṁbu sēyucuṁnuṁḍagānu
ṁ naṁdana saṁvatsara māgha śu 1 sō . śrīmatu
pulimā¨rkolu gaṁḍa Abraciṁtala raṁganā
yiniṁgāri koḍukulu mallānāyaniṁgāru
peṁḍlimaṟa mālaṁgaṟa Aubaḷayyalu siddhavanu
koḍuku dēvaṁṇa dēvarasu koḍuku Appaṁṇa mōṁ
camōryulu guṁḍra mallareḍḍi gurijāla tippireḍḍi kōṭi
koṁnāṭi reḍḍi guṁḍra bayirapa reḍi gurijāla nāgi seṭṭi
bōyavīrannaseṭṭi pedakaṁnāṭi reḍḍi mukhyamayina vīralaku
yiccina dasavaṁdamu śāsana patraṁ mulikināṁṭilōnu mā
ku nāyaṁkaṟānakucellēpeṁḍlimaṟi Ūri paḍumaṭi peda
ceṟuvukaṭṭamīdanu mannuveci kaṭṭē saṁmaṁdamu mīku dasa
vaṁdamupralasiṁgāyalu nūṭikivarimaḍi maṇuvu puṭiṁṭile
khanumīru ceṟuvukaṭṭamīdanu mannu vecemani Iyyakonna mā
ḍalu kaṭṭu gutta munūṟu siṁgāya māḍalakunnumaḍipeṭina vi
varamu Ūrikivenakaprāṁta maḍimaṇuvu muppaṁdumunnu Ūrimuṁ
daṭi Aḍḍagāluva tū¨rputāṭi māṁku staḷaṁmaḍi maṇuvu muppaṁdu
muṁnnu Ubhayamunnu maḍi maṇuvu mūṁḍu puṭluṁnu celliṁcu
vāramu yīdasavaṁdapumaḍi Ūri paḍamaṭi muppaṁdumu maḍiki
paḍumaṭi maḍitōḍaṭṭu Alukukonagalavāru Ūrimuṁdaṭi muppaṁ
dumu mu maḍini Ūrimuṁdaṭi maḍi tōḍaṭṭu Alukukonagalavāru yī
mūṁḍlupuṭlu maḍikini vivaramu Aubaḷōryulaku paṁdumudēvaṁṇaku yeṁ
dumu tippaṇakupaṁdumu maṁcenūghyalaku yeṁdamumalireṭiki tuṁdu
mu tippireḍikini Ā ṟudumukaṁnāṭi reḍikini muttumu bayirapareḍikini mu
ttumunāgiseṭikini muttumu bōyadiṁnaseṭiki yidumunnu yirusapedakaṁ
nāṭiki yiddumuṁnu yirasa Aṭu verasi mūṁḍuvuṭlumaḍinni Ācaṁdrā¨rka
sdhāyigānu Anubhaviṁpagalavāru yī dasavaṁdaṁ maḍikolucukō
ṭhārucoraka tamaku valacina cōṭanu ṟupukoni koṁpōṁgalavāru yīda
savaṁdamu kolucukō rājureḍḍi Adhikārikaraṇamu Aṁgajāla kōṭhibōyuṁḍu
yevvarunu nānabrālu sahitamugānuyēminni Aḍugaka Apṭabhōgatējasvā
myasahitamugānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasdhāyigānuyeṁḍāvānā dappiṁciyē
goḍavalēkuṁḍānu sa¨rvamāṁnyamugānuyistimi yī śāsanaṁ ma
riyādaku yavvaru dappinānu vāraṇāsilōnu yavvarudappi gōvuṁnu brahmanininni caṁ
ppina dōṣāna bōṁgalavāru vīralaAnumatini Ūragaṇamu siṁgarāja
koḍuku yiṁmaḍi vāsinu . mallanavrālu . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōharēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhivaruṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi .
Digital edition of SII 37.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
